title: plantago coronopus subvar. erecta
intro: Plantago coronopus subvar. erecta, also known as buck's-horn or small plantain, is a type of perennial plant in the plantain family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Plantago coronopus subvar. erecta include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
